claims.detail: Simulator compliance claim: data paths avoid public endpoints and honor regional boundaries.

findings.description: Encryption uses customer-managed keys in Key Vault; no cross-region replication for regulated indexes.
findings.recommendation: Document key rotation duties and test restore with CMK-disabled failure modes.

findings.description: Diagnostic settings capture administrative actions on data stores into immutable retention storage.
findings.recommendation: Align retention with your records policy and validate analyst access through PIM.
